appraisal_events.evidence: « il plongea un regard attentif, sérieux, absorbé, presque soucieux, dans les profondeurs du corsage, et ses narines [...] palpitèrent », et « Mme de Surgis elle-même, quoique gênée, étouffa une respiration profonde »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator stages Swann’s sensual greed in public, to the point of embarrassing the marquise. This loss of self-mastery and urbanity undermines his bearing and presents him in a concupiscent light.

status_effects.explanation: The emphatic description of his concupiscent gaze and of the marquise’s embarrassment locally alters the esteem attached to Swann.
